steps.title: Use the program action
steps.content: The sentence says cities are establishing reward points and incentives to encourage shopping at small businesses. The blank needs a verb meaning creating or putting programs into effect.

steps.title: Reject mismatched verbs
steps.content: Choice B means taking possession of a place, which does not fit programs. Choice C means undervaluing, the opposite of encouraging. Choice D means coming across, not creating. The intended verb means formally starting programs. The answer is A.
